# Dream On The Paper

Dream On The Paper creates personalized cinematic visualization wallpapers based on a customer's goals, dreams, emotions, style, theme, and device format.

The product generates calm, premium, wallpaper-first future-life scenes for phones, tablets, desktops, laptops, and custom sizes.

Important product behavior:
- The wallpaper is one cinematic environment, not a collage.
- Generated wallpapers do not include visible faces, quotes, affirmations, typography, logos, watermarks, or text inside the image.
- Customers answer guided questions about their future life, current creation, feelings, scenes, environment, personal details, style, and device.
- A low-resolution preview may be shown before purchase.
- Paid customers receive a clean high-resolution PNG download.

## Public pages

- Home: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/
- Create wallpaper: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/create
- Examples: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/examples
- About: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/about
- Contact: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/terms
- Refund Policy: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/refund-policy

## Product summary

Dream On The Paper is a premium emotional wallpaper service. It helps customers create a personalized cinematic visual reminder of the life they are building.

Common customer goals include:
- peaceful home
- financial freedom
- successful business
- loving family life
- travel
- healthy lifestyle
- calm mind
- creative freedom
- romantic life
- powerful career
- spiritual alignment

Common visual styles include:
- soft luxury
- minimal
- dreamy
- nature
- feminine
- wealth / business
- family / home
- fitness / health
- freedom / travel

## Important restrictions

Generated images should not contain visible faces, text, quotes, affirmations, typography, logos, watermarks, readable symbols, brand names, collage blocks, or moodboard layouts.

Private pages, API routes, checkout sessions, customer orders, and generated wallpaper files are not intended for indexing.
